title: Upsert by ID on Axle Excel Upload in Inventory

requirements.text: When importing inventory items from an Axle-exported Excel file, use the ID column as the unique key: if an item with the same ID already exists in inventory, update all other columns (name, price, stock, category, etc.) with the values from the uploaded file; if no matching ID exists, insert it as a new item.

quotes: saat upload dari axle untuk kolom ID sebagai kunci sementara kolom yang lain mengikuti perubahan yang dilakukan di axle

acceptanceCriteria: Uploading an Excel file from Axle where an item's ID already exists in inventory updates that item's other fields (name, price, stock, etc.) without creating a duplicate.
Uploading an Excel file from Axle where an item's ID does not yet exist in inventory inserts it as a new inventory item.
Items in the current inventory whose IDs are NOT present in the uploaded Axle file remain unchanged.
The ID column is treated as case-insensitive or exact-match key (consistent with existing ID format).
After a successful upsert upload, the inventory table reflects all updated and newly added items immediately.

constraints: Do not change the existing Excel export functionality.
Do not alter how manual Add Item dialog works — only the Excel import (Axle upload) path is affected.
Preserve existing stable storage schema; add migration only if backend data structure must change.
nonGoals: Deleting inventory items that are absent from the uploaded Axle file.
Changing the Excel file format or column structure expected from Axle.
Any changes to the Cashier, Transactions, Reports, or Settings pages.
